---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement or new feature for Cue
title: ''
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## What would you like to do?

Describe the feature or improvement you have in mind.

## Why is this useful?

Explain the problem this solves or the benefit it provides.

## Have you tried any workarounds?

Describe any workarounds you've tried, or say "N/A" if there are none.

## Additional context (optional)

Add any other details, screenshots, or examples that help explain your request.
